title: The best art critics
question: 把今天课文里“别人讲很多解释，但你认真观察、礼貌指出一个简单问题”的线索放进班级海报、艺术作业、幻灯片或照片展示场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: I think it is all right. The colours are nice. But isn't this picture upside down? Maybe this part should be at the top.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 看班级海报：我觉得它还不错，但想礼貌地评价
options.english_template: I think it is all right. The colours and ___ are nice.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 别人都在解释含义：我不想假装懂，只想认真看
options.english_template: I don't want to ___ that I understand everything.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 发现方向不对：我用疑问句礼貌指出画可能挂倒了
